title: Market Brief — Saturday, June 6, 2026
summary: GPU spot prices cratered overnight with B200 down 32.7%, H200 down 24%, and H100 down 23.7%, the sharpest single-day collapse we have tracked. Availability by util-avail tells the story: A100 at 85%, H100 at 70%, and MI300X at 60% signal clear oversupply, while H200 at 45% and B200 at 25% are loosening fast as utilization plunged 19pp and 30pp respectively over 30 days, with GB200 at 10% the sole scarcity point.
paragraphs: GPU spot prices cratered overnight with B200 down 32.7%, H200 down 24%, and H100 down 23.7%, the sharpest single-day collapse we have tracked. Availability by util-avail tells the story: A100 at 85%, H100 at 70%, and MI300X at 60% signal clear oversupply, while H200 at 45% and B200 at 25% are loosening fast as utilization plunged 19pp and 30pp respectively over 30 days, with GB200 at 10% the sole scarcity point.

At TCO-adjusted cost (1.25x spot), Llama 70B inference on B200 runs roughly $5.03/M tokens, making medium-tier API sellers at $3/M lose about $2.03 per million tokens. DeepSeek V3.2 charges $0.34/M output against an estimated production cost north of $5/M on H100, burning cash at industrial scale. Provider grades: OpenAI Neutral, Anthropic Neutral, Google Strong, DeepSeek Burning Cash, open-source Burning Cash.

B200 and H200 spot are overvalued relative to collapsing utilization trends and should be shorted or lease-deferred until demand stabilizes. GB200 at 10% availability is undervalued and supply-constrained, making forward capacity locks at any quoted rate the highest-conviction trade today.
bullets: 85% of A100 capacity sits available by Ornn util-avail, the loosest any GPU class has been in our dataset.
10% util-avail on GB200 marks the only severe shortage across all tracked GPU classes.
$4.20/hr B200 spot is down 32.7% day-over-day, the largest single-day GPU price drop on record.
21.78 on the LLMflation Index means frontier output token pricing has fallen 78% since GPT-4 launch.
$0.18/M output for OpenAI gpt-oss-120b undercuts DeepSeek V3.2 by 47%, the cheapest frontier-class token on the board.
207.5% annualized volatility on H200 OCPI signals that capacity planning on that chip is essentially a coin flip.
